name: Accordion
description: Collapsible content container with single or multi-expand mode.

allowMultiple.description: Allow multiple items to be open simultaneously

defaultOpen.description: Item name(s) to open by default

decision_rule: Use for FAQ sections, grouped settings, and progressive disclosure. Prefer tabs for 2-5 equally-important sections. In Filament forms, use Section with collapsible() instead.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament, use Section::make()->collapsible() for collapsible sections
